title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.515 - Actions to abate, control or clean up not construed as admission of liability
text:
260.515.  Actions to abate, control or clean up not construed as admission of liability. — Any action taken by any person to abate, control, or clean up a hazardous substance involved in a hazardous substance emergency shall not be construed as an admission of liability for a hazardous substance emergency.
(L. 1983 H.B. 528) 
Effective 6-27-83
